CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior, CSR 129. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-03-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-15-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-06-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Mark Bluer, Esq. for Petitioner: Qiu Ping Wei, present as Guardian at litem for: Jia Xing Wei, a minor Claimant, and with Mandarin Interpreter: Yongmei Liu.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $3990.31 (25%)
Costs $981.45
Medical Lien (owed) $3,057.33
Costs $981.45
A net balance of $11,970.91 to be depositted into a blocked account with United Commercial Bank, 2219 Irving St., San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim signed in open court.
